creator: vs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hm, please be careful with this: this patch introduced an error at  
least in databases/clip since LDCONFIG_DIRS was set. In that case,  
setting 'USE_LDCONFIG=yes' will force LDCONFIG_DIRS *back* *to* *the*  
*default* *value*, thus breaking the intended mechanism of runnung  
ldconfig on a custom directory.

Is this analysis correct? Please identify the ports on your list that  
also set LDCONFIG_DIRS!

Volker
